Description: Restrict ERC721 transfers to direct owners or operators explicitly allowed in an operator registry, while preserving blacklist checks and an emergency pause control.

CallingFunctions.Name: transferFrom
CallingFunctions.FunctionSignature: transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 tokenId)
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address operator, address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, uint256 operatorAllowedFlag, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 transfersPausedFlag

CallingFunctions.Name: safeTransferFromWithData
CallingFunctions.FunctionSignature: safeTransferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, bytes data)
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address operator, address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, uint256 operatorAllowedFlag, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 transfersPausedFlag

Rules.Name: Transfer Operator Gate Check
Rules.Description: Allow only direct owner transfers, treasury bypasses, or operators explicitly approved in the registry.

Rules.Name: Transfer Emergency Freeze Check
Rules.Description: Block non-treasury transfers while emergency pause is active.

Rules.Name: SafeTransfer Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block safe transfers with data involving blacklisted addresses.

Rules.Name: SafeTransfer Operator Gate Check
Rules.Description: Allow only direct owner transfers, treasury bypasses, or approved operators in safe transfer flows.

Rules.Name: SafeTransfer Emergency Freeze Check
Rules.Description: Block non-treasury safe transfers while emergency pause is active.
